descriptionForHuman: Search and retrieve internal company knowledge, SharePoint documents, and wiki content.
descriptionForModel: Use this plugin to search the company's internal knowledge base. It contains synced SharePoint documents, wiki pages, internal policies, and technical documentation. Query it when the user asks about company-specific information, internal processes, or organizational knowledge.

conversationStarters.text: Search our knowledge base for onboarding procedures
What SharePoint documents do we have about project guidelines?
Find internal policies about remote work

functions.name: searchDocs
functions.description: Search the company knowledge base using full-text search.

collectionId.description: Optional named collection scope (e.g., Engineering, HR, Sales)

functions.name: listResources
functions.description: List all available knowledge resources and documents.
